fixed_test_commands.name: setupbench validation
fixed_test_commands.command:
_pheragent_setupbench_log="$(mktemp /tmp/pheragent-setupbench.XXXXXX)"
(
verify_multi_worker() { HTTP_PORT=3001 P2P_PORT=6001 npm start & pid1=$!; sleep 45; HTTP_PORT=3002 P2P_PORT=6002 PEERS=ws://localhost:6001 npm start & pid2=$!; sleep 45; code=$(curl -s -H "Content-type:application/json" --data '{"data" : "Some data to the first block"}' -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/mineBlock); [ $code -eq 200 ] && echo "Setup successful" || echo "Setup failed"; pgid1=$(ps -o pgid= $pid1 | tr -d ' '); pgid2=$(ps -o pgid= $pid2 | tr -d ' '); kill -TERM -$pgid1 2>/dev/null; kill -TERM -$pgid2 2>/dev/null; }; verify_multi_worker || echo "Setup failed"
) >"$_pheragent_setupbench_log" 2>&1
_pheragent_setupbench_status=$?
cat "$_pheragent_setupbench_log"
if grep -q "Setup successful" "$_pheragent_setupbench_log" && ! grep -q "Setup failed" "$_pheragent_setupbench_log"; then
  rm -f "$_pheragent_setupbench_log"
  exit 0
fi
rm -f "$_pheragent_setupbench_log"
if [ "$_pheragent_setupbench_status" -eq 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi
exit "$_pheragent_setupbench_status"
fixed_test_commands.original_command: verify_multi_worker() { HTTP_PORT=3001 P2P_PORT=6001 npm start & pid1=$!; sleep 45; HTTP_PORT=3002 P2P_PORT=6002 PEERS=ws://localhost:6001 npm start & pid2=$!; sleep 45; code=$(curl -s -H "Content-type:application/json" --data '{"data" : "Some data to the first block"}' -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/mineBlock); [ $code -eq 200 ] && echo "Setup successful" || echo "Setup failed"; pgid1=$(ps -o pgid= $pid1 | tr -d ' '); pgid2=$(ps -o pgid= $pid2 | tr -d ' '); kill -TERM -$pgid1 2>/dev/null; kill -TERM -$pgid2 2>/dev/null; }; verify_multi_worker || echo "Setup failed"
